photos.title: Louise d'Artois on the Beach at Dieppe, 1830, by Alexandre-Jean Dubois-Drahonet.jpg
photos.description:
Portrait of the Young Princess Louise d'Artois, Daughter of the Duchess of Berry, future Duchess of Parma (1819–1864) on the Beach at Dieppe.
The artist depicted the young princess at the beach of Dieppe at age 11. The young girl’s innocence at age 11 is illustrated through the white bathing costume characteristic of Romantic fashion in the 1830s. The dress, with puffed (“leg-of-mutton”) sleeves definitively ending Empire style fashion, is of silk muslin over long drawers and stockings with embr
photos.author: Alexandre-Jean Dubois-Drahonet
